# YINGJU FURNITURE

YINGJU FURNITURE is the public brand of Hebei Yingju Furniture Co., Ltd, a B2B furniture manufacturer in Bazhou City, Hebei Province, China.

## Main products

- Banquet chairs
- Church chairs
- Wedding and event chairs
- Banquet tables
- Hotel furniture

## Buyer services

- OEM and ODM furniture customization
- Custom frame color, fabric and finish options
- Quality control before shipment
- Export packing and container loading support
- Project quotation support for overseas B2B buyers

## Contact

- Website: https://www.yingjufurniture.com/
- Email: felix@yingjufurniture.com
- WhatsApp: +86 180 3164 8207
